title: Biomedical Device Technology Program Educational Objectives
content:
Biomedical Device Technology Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To train professionals who combine theoretical knowledge with practice, know medical ethics, have a sense of social responsibility and respect patient rights and can fulfill assigned duties in the health sector, based on universal science and education principles,

2. To train biomedical technicians who have the knowledge and equipment to be able to work in the installation, maintenance and repair of medical devices used in diagnosis and treatment in the health field, detect and fix faults, and carry out biomedical and clinical engineering processes,

3. It is aimed to produce qualified graduates who can work in business structures and organizations in the medical and health sector, who are well-versed in technical information and working principles of medical devices and vehicles, have knowledge of problem detection and definition in medical devices, know quality management systems in medical devices, have knowledge of testing, control and calibration of medical devices, are compatible with teamwork, are open to professional development and follow scientific and technological developments.
